name: zineit
description: ZineIt by Storitellah — a local-first zine and photobook layout tool for photojournalists.

scripts.www: mkdir -p www && cp index.html manifest.webmanifest sw.js favicon.ico favicon.svg apple-touch-icon.png icon-192.png icon-512.png www/
scripts.android:sync: npm run www && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:debug: npm run android:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:release: npm run android:sync && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease assembleRelease
